templates.title: Nocturne
templates.description: Nightscout-compatible diabetes management API with Row Level Security and multi-tenancy.
templates.note: After deployment, configure data connectors (Dexcom, LibreLinkUp, etc.) and chat bot integrations (Discord, Slack, Telegram, WhatsApp) through Settings → Administration in the Nocturne UI. Bot credentials are encrypted at rest.

env.name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
env.label: PostgreSQL bootstrap password
env.description: Used only at first container start to create runtime roles

env.name: POSTGRES_MIGRATOR_PASSWORD
env.label: Migrator role password
env.description: Password for nocturne_migrator — owns the schema, runs EF migrations

env.name: POSTGRES_APP_PASSWORD
env.label: App role password
env.description: Password for nocturne_app — runtime role, cannot bypass Row Level Security

env.name: POSTGRES_WEB_PASSWORD
env.label: Web role password
env.description: Password for nocturne_web — bot-framework state, cannot bypass Row Level Security

env.name: INSTANCE_KEY
env.label: Instance key
env.description: Minimum 12 characters — used for JWT signing and service authentication

env.name: BASE_DOMAIN
env.label: Base domain
env.description: Root domain only, e.g. example.com (not app.example.com — subdomains are generated per tenant)

env.name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT
env.label: OpenTelemetry OTLP endpoint
env.description: Collector URL to export metrics/traces/logs to, e.g. http://otel-collector:4317. Leave empty to disable telemetry.

env.name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL
env.label: OpenTelemetry OTLP protocol
env.description: grpc (port 4317) or http/protobuf (port 4318). Only used when the endpoint is set.
